execution: .github/workflows/ci.yml Backend Business runs the candidate capture twice, compares it with the committed reference using exact JSON/raw bytes, generates the AST inventory, and uploads phase0-runtime-session-evidence
reason: Current production exposes timing and message byte counters but does not expose allocator, IPC, DB byte or log-rate counters at one stable boundary. Phase 0 records this as an explicit instrumentation gap; Phase 4 cannot pass without numeric reference captures.
